name: hongtrancac
description: Nền tảng đọc truyện chữ online xây dựng trên **WordPress** + custom theme + plugin.

scripts.test: php tests/run.php && find wp-content/themes/hongtrancac wp-content/plugins/hdk-core -name '*.php' -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 php -l && node --check wp-content/themes/hongtrancac/assets/js/main.js
